basicAttack.name: Destructive Sequence
basicAttack.description:
BASIC ATTACK: 
An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>. As the controlled operator, <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> also deals <@ba.poise>{poise:0}</> Stagger. 

DIVE ATTACK: 
Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> to nearby enemies. 

FINISHER: 
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and recovers some SP.

battleSkill.name: Constructive Sequence
battleSkill.description: A forceful burst of Originium Arts that attacks enemies within the area of effect. Deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and applies <#ba.crush>Crush</>.

comboSkill.name: Sealing Sequence
comboSkill.description:
COMBO TRIGGER: When another operator in the team deals DMG with combo skills. 
Rushes to the enemy's side to deal <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and attach <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> that temporarily seal them. Applying <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> or <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> to the sealed enemy <#ba.consume>consumes</> the <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> and deals additional <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>.

ultimate.name: Bombardment Sequence
ultimate.description: Bombards the ground with Originium Arts, dealing massive <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> to all enemies within a fan-shaped area. If the enemy has <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> on them, this skill <#ba.consume>consumes</> the <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> and deals one more hit of <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>.

levels: When the <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> attached to the enemy are <#ba.consume>consumed</>, the Endministrator gains ATK <@ba.vup>+{atk_up:0%}</> for {duration:0}s. This effect cannot stack.
When the <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> attached to the enemy are <#ba.consume>consumed</>, the Endministrator gains ATK <@ba.vup>+{atk_up:0%}</> for {duration:0}s. This effect cannot stack.
talent1.name: Essence Disintegration

levels: Enemies with attached <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> suffer Physical DMG Taken <@ba.vup>+{dmg:0%}</>.
Enemies with attached <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> suffer Physical DMG Taken <@ba.vup>+{dmg:0%}</>.
talent2.name: Realspace Stasis

potential1.description: Battle skill <@ba.key>Constructive Sequence</> improved: <#ba.consume>Consuming</> <#ba.originium>Originium Crystals</> <#ba.return>returns</> <@ba.vup>{atb_return:0}</> SP.
potential1.name: Final Awakening

potential2.description: Talent <@ba.key>Essence Disintegration</> improved: When the Endministrator gains the ATK buff, other allied operators gain half of this ATK buff.
potential2.name: Reflection of Authority

potential1.name: Memory Mesh
potential1.author: 狂zip
potential1.description: The last log is a small passage, or some form of a directive. The threads have been woven and the pieces are in place. You knew about all this.

potential3.name: Quadrant
potential3.author: 廻轉
potential3.description: You stand right at the center of the crossroads.

potential5.name: Fully Grasped
potential5.author: 수줍(Sjoop)
potential5.description: Trust and faith congealed within your palm. The first fragment is named history. Its other name is Civilization and Life.
